calorieTracker.title: Calorie Tracker
calorieTracker.description: Track your meals and daily calorie intake

feedback.title: Feedback & Support
feedback.description: Share feedback or report an issue

nearbyGuide.title: Nearby Guide
nearbyGuide.description: Nearest pharmacy, market, and bus stop

spa.intro: You will experience one of the most precious moments of your holiday at Dosinia Spa. With its professional team, excellent hygiene environment and quality spa products, you can relax and start your future moments by feeling refreshed and great.

wellness.intro: Add value to your holiday by renewing yourself with activities such as fitness, yoga or water sports where you will increase the energy in your body.

hotelInfo.title: Hotel Information
hotelInfo.wifiLocked: <link>Sign in</link> with your room details to view Wi-Fi credentials.

beachPools.title: Beach & Pools
beachPools.intro: The beach and pools of our hotel offer peace and fun together while you enjoy the sun. An ideal environment awaits you for a holiday full of both rest and water activities.
beachPools.beachFallback: Sink your toes into the soft sand and let the crystal-clear waters of the Mediterranean wash your worries away. Our private beach offers the ultimate escape.
beachPools.poolFallback: Dive into our luxurious pools, designed for relaxation and enjoyment. Whether you're looking to swim laps or lounge by the water, our pools provide the perfect setting.
beachPools.galleryIntro: Explore our beautiful beach and pool areas through these stunning photos.
beachPools.galleryDesktop: Click on any image to view it in full size, or press and hold for a quick preview.
beachPools.galleryMobile: Tap to view full size, or press and hold for a quick preview.

roomService.title: Room Service
roomService.subtitle: Order food, beverages, and request services to your room.

cart.orderPlacedDesc: Your order has been received. We'll deliver it to your room shortly.
cart.emptyDesc: Add items from the room service menu to get started.
cart.title: Your Cart
cart.subtitle: Review your items before placing your order.
cart.orderNotePlaceholder: Add any special instructions or requests for your order...
cart.loginToOrder: Log in to place an order

nearbyGuidePage.title: Nearby Guide
nearbyGuidePage.subtitle: The nearest places are listed below.

restaurantCard.reserveDesc: Table reservations are handled by our reception team. Reach us by phone or WhatsApp and we'll arrange it for you.
restaurantCard.visitReception: Please visit the reception desk to make a reservation.
restaurantCard.whatsappText: Hello, I would like to reserve a table at {name}.

events.title: Events
events.eventsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No events scheduled} one {# event scheduled} other {# events scheduled}}
events.noEventsDay: No events scheduled for this day.
events.selectDifferent: Select a different date to view events.

kidsCare.intro: We are dedicated to providing a safe, fun, and engaging environment for our youngest guests. Explore our bespoke services designed to ensure a memorable stay for the entire family.
kidsCare.swipeHint: Swipe to view each day's activities

calorie.title: AI Calorie Tracker
calorie.subtitle: Snap a photo of your dining plate to estimate calories and nutrition metrics automatically using advanced AI vision processing.
calorie.uploadDesc: Select an image of your meal plate to analyze calories.
calorie.takePicture: Take a picture or drop a file here
calorie.breakdownDesc: AI vision estimates of your plate contents.
calorie.toastChooseFirst: Please choose or capture an image first.
calorie.toastAnalyzeFailed: Analysis failed. Check the backend connection.
calorie.toastValidTarget: Please enter a valid calorie target number.
calorie.toastTargetSet: Daily calorie target set to {n} kcal!
calorie.historySubtitle: Review your daily meal logs and calorie totals for your stay.
calorie.noHistoryDesc: You haven't logged any meals during your stay yet. Go back to the tracker to scan your plate.
calorie.mealsLogged: {count, plural, one {# meal logged} other {# meals logged}}

plan.assignedDaysDesc: Only days with assigned activities are listed. Tap a day to reveal its activities.
plan.noActivitiesDesc: Go back and add activities to a day first.
plan.heroDesc: Build a day-by-day schedule from the hotel's event list. This page is open directly, without sign-in.
plan.emptyPicker: Once hotel events are added, this section will turn into a simple activity picker.
plan.availableDesc: Activities are grouped by type. Tap a title to reveal the details underneath.

portal.nightsLeft: {n, plural, one {# night left} other {# nights left}}
portal.noOrdersDesc: Your room service orders will appear here once you place them.
portal.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this order? This action cannot be undone.
portal.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Changed my mind, ordered by mistake…
portal.quickConfirmDesc: We'll notify our team for your room right away.
portal.requestSent: Request sent — our team has been notified.
portal.requestError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
portal.iosInstall: To receive order updates on iPhone or iPad, add this site to your Home Screen first: tap <share></share> Share, then <add></add> Add to Home Screen, and open the app from there.
portal.denied: Notifications are blocked for this site. To enable them, allow notifications in your browser settings and reload the page.
portal.orderUpdatesDesc: Get notified when your room service order or request is handled — even when this page is closed.
portal.notifOn: Notifications on — we'll keep you posted on your orders and requests.
portal.thankYouDesc: We truly appreciate you sharing your experience with us.
portal.overallDesc: How would you rate your stay?
portal.commentPlaceholder: Tell us what you loved or what we could improve…
